bolt.guidance: Verify that the QEMU boot test incorporates an appropriate timeout (e.g., `timeout 5m qemu-system-x86_64 ...`) to avoid blocking the CI pipeline indefinitely in case of a boot failure.

palette.guidance: No UX enhancements required for this task.

sentinel.guidance: Audit the usage of QEMU within the GitHub Actions environment. Ensure it operates with least privilege and does not require `--privileged` container execution if avoidable.
